title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Added README and contract docs for the session provider two-phase CLI flow, clarified response path and phase-2 mode/quality mismatch behavior, and added a warning when phase 2 CLI quality differs from the persisted request. Verification: uv run pytest => 109 passed; py_compile meeting_ingest modules passed.
next_actions: Optional next step: add a small wrapper/sub-agent prompt template that reads provider-request JSON and writes a compliant provider-response envelope.
continuation_hint: Next: Optional next step: add a small wrapper/sub-agent prompt template that reads provider-request JSON and writes a compliant provider-response envelope.
